title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Rackspace India - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Rackspace India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Software Engineer for our Jabalpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rackspace India:
Rackspace India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rackspace India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
